_comment: Per-payer Transparency-in-Coverage in-network source URLs for the scheduled ingest job (app/ingest_tic_job). Copy to tic_sources.json and fill in each payer's published in-network file URL. 'payer' must match a catalog id in app/catalog.py so the verified ingest supersedes the estimate. Re-run monthly; ingestion is idempotent. Document each URL + retrieval date in the README.

sources.note: Aetna machine-readable index — replace with the real published URL
Cigna machine-readable index — replace with the real published URL
